# Michael Huang — michaelhuang.ca

Michael Huang is an AI-native full-stack engineer and consultant based in Vancouver, BC, Canada.

## What this site covers
- Professional background and work history (2016–present)
- Engineering projects: Tarive (cross-platform mobile app), Prompt Studio, SI8 purchasing automation
- Technical writing and case studies
- Contact information and consulting availability

## Key facts
- Current roles: Senior Software Engineer at Traction Complete (Aug 2025–present); Founder & Principal Engineer at SI8 Technology (Jan 2025–present)
- Previous: Full Stack Engineer at GrainFox (Oct 2022–Jan 2024), Robotic Developer at MapaRobo (Oct 2021–Mar 2022), Control Engineer Co-op at Ballard Power Systems (Jan–Aug 2020)
- Education: Simon Fraser University, Computer Science
- Core skills: TypeScript, Next.js, React Native, Python, AWS Lambda/CDK, Anthropic Claude API, agentic workflow design, Playwright/Selenium
- Achievements: 5× engineering velocity via agentic workflows, 30% AWS infrastructure cost reduction, 80% reduction in manual data entry at GrainFox
- Open to: consulting engagements, senior full-stack engineering roles, AI integration projects
